battleTraits.name: The Lurking Vermintide
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that has not been deployed to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: The target unit is set up in reserve in the tunnels below. Units in the tunnels below that have not used the ‘Gnawhole Ambush’ ability by the end of the third battle round are destroyed.

battleTraits.name: Gnawhole Ambush
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly unit that is in the tunnels below to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a corner of the battlefield and more than 9" from all enemy units.

enhancements.name: Lead the Seething Horde
enhancements.timing: Reaction: You declared the ‘Call for Reinforcements’ ability
enhancements.effect: Instead of using the set-up instructions in the ‘Call for Reinforcements’ ability, the replacement unit can be set up wholly within 13" of this unit and not in combat.

enhancements.name: Skryre Connections
enhancements.effect: Your general’s Ratling Pistol has an Attacks characteristic of 2D6 instead of D6.

enhancements.name: Warpstone Charm
enhancements.effect: Subtract 1 from save rolls for enemy units in combat with your general.

regimentAbilities.name: Warpstone-Laced Bullets
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Battle, Your Shooting Phase
regimentAbilities.declare: Pick a ranged weapon a friendly unit is armed with.
regimentAbilities.effect: That weapon has Crit (Mortal) this phase.

regimentAbilities.name: Too Quick to Hit-Hit
regimentAbilities.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly units when they use Retreat abilities.

abilities.name: Cornered Rat
abilities.effect: While this unit is damaged, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of its Warpforged Halberd.

abilities.name: Will of the Horned Rat
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target, then roll a dice.
abilities.effect: On a 3+, add the roll to the target’s control score until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 13" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: On a 6+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: More-More Warp Energy!
abilities.timing: Reaction: You declared a Shoot ability for this unit and it has not used a Move ability this turn
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 2+, set the Damage characteristic of its Warplock Musket to 3 this phase. On a 1, inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit.

abilities.name: Seething Swarm
abilities.effect: You can return D3 slain models to this unit.

abilities.name: Unleashed Warp-Fury
abilities.timing: Any Combat Phase, Once Per Battle
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on this unit. Then, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons this phase.
